dialogue_text: Help Dorothy to kill the Wicked Witch of the West,
source_excerpt: "Help Dorothy to kill the Wicked Witch of the West," replied the Beast. "When the Witch is dead, come to me, and I will then give you the biggest and kindest and most loving heart in all the Land of Oz."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
